'''pataka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:enactor|enactor]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-t-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:enactor|enactor]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| pataka
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:pætækæth|pætækæth]] || [[word:pætækæj|pætækæj]] || [[word:pætækæsh|pætækæsh]] || [[word:pætækæ|pætækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:patatakath|patatakath]] || [[word:patatakaj|patatakaj]] || [[word:patatakash|patatakash]] || [[word:patataka|patataka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:patakath|patakath]] || [[word:patakaj|patakaj]] || [[word:patakash|patakash]] || [[word:pataka|pataka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:patafkath|patafkath]] || [[word:patafkaj|patafkaj]] || [[word:patafkash|patafkash]] || [[word:patafkaf|patafkaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:patakatha|patakatha]] || [[word:patakaja|patakaja]] || [[word:patakasha|patakasha]] || [[word:patakaka|patakaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:patakath|patakath]] || [[word:patakaj|patakaj]] || [[word:patakash|patakash]] || [[word:pataka|pataka]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:patakathal|patakathal]] || [[word:patakajal|patakajal]] || [[word:patakashal|patakashal]] || [[word:patakakal|patakakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:patakathatha|patakathatha]] || [[word:patakajaja|patakajaja]] || [[word:patakashasha|patakashasha]] || [[word:patakaka|patakaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:patakathan|patakathan]] || [[word:patakajan|patakajan]] || [[word:patakashan|patakashan]] || [[word:patakakan|patakakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:patakathaoro|patakathaoro]] || [[word:patakajaoro|patakajaoro]] || [[word:patakashaoro|patakashaoro]] || [[word:patakakaoro|patakakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d414c41}}
